'''Jurec Tre''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Spiner]] criminal imprisoned on the [[Spice mines of Kessel/Legends|Spice Mines of Kessel]] for several counts of murder on [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]]. He was the toughest and most aggressive prisoner in his block and a natural bully. He had intimidated a small group of prisoners to act as his personal thugs. He had a habit of hoarding any useful objects that came into his possession..<ref name="Geonosis ">''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''</ref>
